'''Sien Siev''' was a member of the [[New Republic High Council]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. Siev was also a historical expert, and had an extensive knowledge of the history of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
